welcome: 👋 Hello! I'm a #reaction bot — I automatically react to messages in channels and groups ✅ How would you like to use the bot?
choose_type: How would you like to use the bot?
sub_required: 🔒 To use the bot, please subscribe to {channel} and send /start again.
channel_list:
📋 Your channels list:

You can set up auto reactions for the following channel
no_channels: You have no channels yet. Add a channel 👇
no_groups: You have no groups yet. Add a group 👇
add_bot_to_channel:
Add the bot to your channel as admin and press the button below.

After that:
• The bot will react to new channel posts automatically
• You can change the reaction type from the channel settings in your private chat
add_bot_to_group:
Add the bot to your group as admin and press the button below.

Group commands:
• /reaksiya — choose a reaction
• /reaksiya_on — enable auto reaction
• /reaksiya_off — disable auto reaction
• /bos 😎 — quick reaction
reaction_select:
Choose which reaction will be sent on every message in the group 👇

✅ Press Done after selecting
auto_react_on: ✅ Auto reaction enabled for this group 🤖
auto_react_off: ❌ Auto reaction disabled for this group 🤖
bos_hint:
Add an emoji after /bos.
Example: /bos 😎 or premium emoji ⭐
only_admin: ❌ This command is for group admins only!
